description_long: This high chair features a tall, rectangular frame constructed primarily from metal, with a series of horizontal slats forming the seat and backrest. The chair is supported by multiple slender legs, providing stability and an elevated seating position. The design is minimalist and industrial, with open spaces between the slats and legs, giving it a lightweight appearance. There is no visible tray or harness system, and the seat appears to be fixed in place without any adjustable components. The footrest is a simple horizontal bar located below the seat, offering basic support for the feet. The overall finish is sleek and glossy, with a dominant black color accented by metallic highlights.
description: A tall, industrial-style high chair with a slatted seat and backrest, supported by multiple slender metal legs. The design is minimalist, glossy, and primarily black with metallic accents.
description_view_0: From this end-on view, the high chair's narrow profile and the alignment of the slats on the seat and backrest are visible, along with the arrangement of the supporting legs.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the full length of the chair, the open slatted design, and the multiple supporting legs, as well as the position of the footrest bar beneath the seat.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this end-on perspective shows the chair's narrow width, the slatted seat, and the vertical alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: This side view mirrors view 1, highlighting the elongated frame, slatted surfaces, and the distribution of the supporting legs and footrest.
attribute_footrest_design: A simple, horizontal bar footrest is positioned below the seat, fixed in place and not adjustable.
